artifacts.summary: Official MIPT-domain discovery found a November 2024 MIPT news article reporting proposed AI-in-education rules from a strategic session and an official MIPT/FPMI AI training course page. This staged crawl did not verify a central binding university-wide policy for student or faculty generative-AI use.

artifacts.sourceTitle: В МФТИ предложили правила работы с искусственным интеллектом в образовании
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: В МФТИ проходит VI Международная конференция «Человек и ИИ: взаимодействие для достижения синергии». Накануне конференции в МФТИ провели стратегическую сессию «Образование в эпоху искусственного интеллекта: точки роста и стратегия лидерства». По итогам сессии разработаны правила использования ИИ в образовательной среде.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: MIPT reports that before the conference it held a strategic session on education in the age of AI, and that rules for AI use in the educational environment were developed as a result.

artifacts.title: MIPT staged AI policy source-status summary
artifacts.summary: Official MIPT-domain discovery found a MIPT news page reporting proposed rules for AI use in the educational environment and an official AI course page that was rejected as non-policy. No central binding university-wide generative-AI policy was verified in this staged crawl.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claim is limited to source discovery status and should not be read as a binding MIPT AI-use rule.
Russian original-language source text is canonical; English text is display-only helper text.
